# ScalexStore

> Online footwear store. Sneakers, running shoes, boots, and sandals.
> Full machine-readable catalog available as JSON at /products.json

## Products

- [Nike Air Max 270](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product-1.html): Nike, sneakers, $129.99, Blue, in_stock — The Nike Air Max 270 delivers visible cushioning under every step with a large Air unit in the heel — the biggest in Nike running history.
- [Adidas Stan Smith](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product-2.html): Adidas, sneakers, $89.99, White, in_stock — A timeless tennis-inspired silhouette that has transcended sport and become a global style icon.

- [New Balance 574](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product-4.html): New Balance, sneakers, $79.99, Grey, in_stock — The New Balance 574 is a retro-running icon reborn for everyday comfort.
- [Vans Old Skool](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product-5.html): Vans, sneakers, $69.99, Black, in_stock — The Vans Old Skool was the first shoe to feature the iconic Vans side stripe — and it's been a skate and street staple ever since.

- [Brooks Ghost 15](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product-8.html): Brooks, running, $139.99, Green, in_stock — The Brooks Ghost 15 is a trusted daily trainer built for neutral runners who want a smooth, balanced ride.

- [Teva Original Universal Sandal](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product-14.html): Teva, sandals, $55.00, Black, in_stock — Born on the Colorado River in 1984, the Teva Original Universal is the adventure sandal that started it all.
- [Reef Cushion Bounce Phantom](https://dailmyshop.netlify.app/product-15.html): Reef, sandals, $74.99, Black, in_stock — The Reef Cushion Bounce Phantom combines style with serious comfort technology.
